title: VANDR-113 Hidden Secrets Lesbian School Girls In Their Own Secret Base Where No One Is - Serizawa Tsumugi
overview: The two lovey-dovey people are immersed in their own world, and every day before and after school, they overlap their bodies to confirm their love for each other. The two of them always see only themselves, and their heads are full of each other. Always quietly deepening love in a place where no one is found. The tongue is entwined so as to confirm each other and the crotch is moistened hot. "Let's be together forever (Heart)".
